title: Simply Enchantments
description: This mod adds allot of new and exciting enchantments in the game!
body:
[![kinetic hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3e5234712d32562be999b307b425ca6286f4b8e_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1433)
This mod allows the player to use the enchantments that are added by the Simply Cozy mod. this mod adds a few new enchantments and more to come!

Windcharged: a bow enchantment that has a chance to fling the victem 15 blocks in the air

Esspresso Edge: has a chance to give the attacker a speed boost for a few seconds

Void Touch: when the attacker is hitting a combo then you will do 4 hearts of damage instandly! regardless what armor the victem is wearing

Poison Touch: has a chance to poison the victem

the mod also allows to disable or enable the enchantments via a command:

```
/simplycozy enchantments <true|false>
```
